title: Minimal Resilient Character Card V2
description: Schema for llm-agents/*.json character cards. Add filename to index.json to register in the agent dropdown.

name.description: The character's display name. Used as AI display name in the chat UI.

description.description: Core persona, physical traits, and background. Used as fallback system prompt if system_prompt is absent.

first_mes.description: Initial greeting injected as the first assistant message when the agent is selected on a fresh conversation.

personality.description: Personality traits and behavioural tendencies. Appended to system_prompt composite if system_prompt is absent.

scenario.description: The situational context or framing for the interaction.

mes_example.description: Few-shot example exchange in <START> / {{user}} / {{char}} format to anchor the model's response style.

system_prompt.description: Primary system prompt injected at the top of every request. Takes precedence over description + personality.

post_history_instructions.description: Instructions appended after the conversation history to reinforce persona throughout long sessions.

alternate_greetings.description: Alternative first_mes strings (not currently used by the UI — reserved for future greeting picker).

tags.description: Categorisation tags. Displayed as tooltip on the dropdown option. Logged to sys-log on agent load.

creator_notes.description: Usage notes logged to the chat sys-log when the agent is selected.

character_version.description: Semantic version of this character card.

avatar.description: Path or URL to an avatar image. Reserved for future UI use.

extensions.description: Arbitrary extension data. Reserved for future feature flags or UI hints.

character_book.description: Lorebook / world-info object. Entries are keyword-triggered and injected into context before each API call.

name.description: Display name shown in the Lorebook panel.

scan_depth.description: How many recent messages to scan for keyword triggers. Default: 4.

token_budget.description: Max total chars of lorebook content to inject per turn. Default: 2048.

recursive_scanning.description: Whether matched entry content is also scanned for further triggers.

entries.description: Array of lorebook entries. Each entry is injected when any of its keys appear in recent messages.

secondary_keys.description: Optional: ALL secondary keys must also match for entry to fire (AND logic).

content.description: World-state text injected into context when triggered.

position.description: Injection position relative to the system prompt.

comment.description: Internal author note — not injected into context.

constant.description: If true, always inject regardless of keyword matches.
